title: Incorrect xfer optimization with INTERGER PRIMARY KEY ON CONFLICT REPLACE
key_bug_features: INTERGER PRIMARY KEY ON CONFLICT REPLACE optimization issue
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY ON CONFLICT REPLACE, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'B', 20.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (NULL, 'C', 30.5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > 15.0);
